mapper.select: SELECT a.district_no as code , a.district_nm FROM tb_district_info a
SELECT ass.asset_id as code , ass.name FROM tb_asset ass WHERE ass.asset_kind_id IN ('2','3','4','6','7') -- 센서 ORDER BY ass.name
SELECT ass.asset_id as code , ass.name FROM tb_asset ass WHERE ass.asset_kind_id IN ('2','3','4','6','7') -- 센서 AND ass.zone_id = #{zone_id} ORDER BY asset_id::integer
SELECT z.mapping_id as code , z.device_id as name FROM tb_mapping z ORDER BY z.device_id
